g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does OpenVINO convert PyTorch models?')
sendPrompt('How does OpenVINO convert TensorFlow models?')
sendPrompt('What is ONNX and why does OpenVINO support it?')
sendPrompt('What graph optimizations does the OpenVINO Model Optimizer apply?')
sendPrompt('What is an OpenVINO Intermediate Representation?')
sendPrompt('How does the OpenVINO Runtime execute inference?')
sendPrompt('How does OpenVINO optimize inference on Intel CPUs?')
sendPrompt('What Intel GPUs does OpenVINO support?')
sendPrompt('What is an NPU and how does OpenVINO use it?')
sendPrompt('How does OpenVINO target FPGA hardware?')
